items.name: Government-Issued Uniforms
items.description: All OCP uniforms, PT gear, and boots are issued at BMT
items.whyNeeded: The Air Force issues all uniforms and gear. Purchasing beforehand is unnecessary.
items.selectionTips: Do not buy ABUs or OCPs ahead of time. Wait to be issued the correct items.

items.name: Personal Hygiene Items
items.whyNeeded: Airmen are expected to maintain a polished appearance from day one.
items.selectionTips: Unscented products preferred. Minimum quantity — you'll use the BX for restocking.

recommendedProducts.name: Military Hygiene Travel Kit
recommendedProducts.reason: Compact and AF-compliant. Keeps you squared away for Thunderbolt inspections without wasting limited wall locker space.

items.name: White Athletic Socks
items.description: Plain white crew socks for PT
items.selectionTips: Plain white only, no colored stripes or logos. Bring 8 pairs minimum.

recommendedProducts.name: Darn Tough Athletic Crew Sock
recommendedProducts.reason: Lifetime guarantee and superior moisture management versus standard PX socks. Your feet will thank you during long parade days in Texas heat.

items.name: Combination Lock
items.whyNeeded: Required to secure your wall locker.
items.selectionTips: Combination only — no keys. Write down the combo and leave it with a trusted person.

items.name: Identification Documents
items.description: Birth certificate, Social Security card, state ID
items.whyNeeded: Required for in-processing and personnel records.
items.selectionTips: Originals only. Place them in a sealed envelope — they'll be collected at reception.

items.name: Shoe Insoles
items.selectionTips: Much of BMT involves standing on concrete. Insoles help prevent shin splints.

recommendedProducts.name: Superfeet Green Insoles
recommendedProducts.reason: Lackland's concrete ramps are relentless on joints. Superfeet's biomechanical support prevents the shin splints and stress fractures that sideline trainees.

items.name: Stationery and Stamps
items.description: Envelopes, paper, and stamps for letters home
items.selectionTips: Physical mail is your lifeline during BMT. Stock up before shipping out.

items.name: Foot Powder
items.selectionTips: Texas heat makes foot care essential. Apply after every shower.

items.name: Cell Phone
items.notes: Phones permitted only on designated phone privileges. Cannot be kept in dormitory.

items.name: Civilian Clothing
items.notes: All civilian clothing will be bagged and stored until graduation.
